service_value_weights.description: Relative revenue/margin weights by service, product, query theme, or page family. 1.0 = neutral; >1 = more valuable.

target_customer_priority.description: Priority and deprioritized customer segments for qualified organic growth.

location_priorities.description: Market/service-area priorities, capacity, and margin context.

conversion_events.description: Organic conversion events or funnel signals with optional value weights and URL/query matches.

serp_competitor_positioning.description: Competitors/directories/SERP modules that affect priority queries.

page_role_map.description: Mapping from URL/path to transactional, commercial, local, support, informational, or docs role.

internal_link_sources.description: Known hub/category, adjacent commercial/service, and support/blog/docs pages that should link to priority SEO targets.

retired_or_cannibal_pages.description: URLs that should be noindex, redirected, canonicalized, removed from sitemap, or removed from internal links.
